character_arcs.LADY_E_WC: Referee of the day — black/gold striped referee-inspired dress + gold whistle. Opens the day with the kickoff whistle, reveals deals like calling plays, closes Golden Hour with the final whistle.
character_arcs.LUCKY_LOU_WC: Wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey (no real logos) + fishing hat with soccer ball sticker. Spends all day 'almost scoring' — hits the post at noon, misses a header at 6PM — then buries the winning goal-style jackpot at 11PM. Always ends the day winning.
character_arcs.GOLDEN_DEALER: Silent presence at the penalty spot. Appears once in Act 3 to reveal the Golden Boot Jackpot with a single spinning chip. One sentence max.

deals.name: Golden Boot Jackpot
deals.mechanic: Biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus
deals.line: Score the biggest. Win the boot.

deals.name: Hat Trick Bonus
deals.mechanic: 3 recharges during match hours = stacked bonus

deals.name: Penalty Kick Free Spin
deals.mechanic: Share code REF-GOAL-347, friend joins, both get a free spin bonus
deals.line: Pass it. They score. You both win.

deals.name: Halftime Reload
deals.mechanic: Mystery midnight drop for active players

posts.concept: Lady E in referee dress blows gold whistle in the casino lounge; stadium floodlights flare, gold confetti falls like a kickoff. Semifinal day is HERE.
Golden soccer boot on a pedestal dripping gold coins, dark emerald turf background. Golden Boot Jackpot reveal — biggest recharge wins.
Bonus wheel styled as a soccer ball mid-spin, gold segments glowing. Morning spin reminder — resets at midnight.
Lady E holds open a gold-trimmed locker-room door revealing a glowing VIP lounge. New players are today's new signings — welcome bonus. 'You belong here.'
Lucky Lou in soccer jersey lines up a penalty against a goal net dripping gold coins — ball hits the post. SO close. Almost-win energy before the match.
Stadium tunnel view with casino chips lined up like players walking out. 2 hours to kickoff — pre-match hype.
Three gold casino chips arranged like a hat trick of goals in the net, each glowing brighter. Hat Trick Bonus live 3PM-6PM.
Golden Dealer stands at the penalty spot, single chip spinning on the turf. Silent tension. Match is live — Stories only.
Penalty Kick Free Spin: ball passed between two players morphs into a spinning gold chip mid-flight. Share REF-GOAL-347 — you both win.
Community banter post: who takes the trophy — and who's claiming Hat Trick Bonus? Drop your emoji. Referral code shared.
The Summer Crew celebrates in the VIP lounge like a stadium crowd, gold confetti, phones raised. Full-time celebration — community wins parade.
Elegant gold pocket watch at 11:55 on emerald felt. Daily bonus reminder — claim before the day resets.
Golden boot silhouette lit by a single spotlight — Golden Boot Jackpot last-call story (double-post of today's special).
Mystery gold envelope on a penalty spot under a floodlight beam. Halftime Reload mystery drop is live.
Lucky Lou finally scores — top corner — net explodes into gold coins, he lifts his fishing hat like a trophy. Tomorrow tease: 'The final is coming.'

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.mood: Stadium anthem energy — triumphant, rolling percussion, brass stabs
song_of_the_day.instruments: Log drums, 808 bass, stadium claps, brass section stabs, shekere, crowd chant layers, airhorn accents

lyrics.intro:
(whistle blows)
Ohhh... you hear the crowd?
Lady E on the pitch tonight
Golden hour, golden light
Let's go!
lyrics.verse_1:
Step out the tunnel, floodlights on me
Emerald turf but the crown stays gold, see
Ninety minutes, nah, we play all day
Every spin's a shot and it's headed my way
Lou's on the wing with the clover in hand
Dealer at the spot, silent where he stands
Whistle on my chain, I decide the game
Semifinal fire, go and light that flame
lyrics.pre_chorus:
One kick... (one kick)
One spin... (one spin)
The net is made of gold
and we're bringing it in
lyrics.chorus:
Golden kick, golden kick
Watch it fly, watch it stick
Top corner, hear it ring
Crowd goes up, we're the kings
Golden kick, golden kick
Fortune moves, better be quick
When the whistle hits the night
Every win is gold tonight
lyrics.verse_2:
Halftime? Nah, we reload the play
Hat trick bonus 'fore the end of the day
Pass it to a friend, penalty gets paid
Both of us score when the code gets played
Midnight drop like a stoppage-time goal
Second half surprise, watch the story unfold
Atlanta to the lounge, we run the show
Final whistle blows and the gold still glows
lyrics.bridge:
(crowd chant: OHHH — OH OH OH)
When they play it safe... we play it bold
(OHHH — OH OH OH)
When the night comes down... it comes down gold
lyrics.final_chorus:
Golden kick, golden kick
Watch it fly, watch it stick
Top corner, hear it ring
Crowd goes up, we're the kings
Golden kick, golden kick
Fortune moves, better be quick
Extra time is ours tonight
Every win is gold tonight
lyrics.outro:
(final whistle)
That's full time, baby
But at Lady E Luck?
We always play extra time
(crowd fades)

voice_lines.text: Semifinal day, players. The whistle is mine, the gold is yours. Kickoff at Lady E Luck starts now.
Hit the post AGAIN? Oh come on! You know what — extra time. That's my time. Lou always finds the net.
The boot goes to the bold.
